positionAnalysis.thesis: Retail turnaround, 62% P/E discount to peers
Reverse mortgage leader, Blue Owl $2.5B partnership

watchFor: AVOID: Complete trading paralysis; no signals taken even when ES ranged 14 pts and fulfilled the neutral-regime criteria.
AVOID: Failure to log agent reasoning means no post-market review loop—this is how edge erosion starts.
tomorrowRules: Pre-market: if VIX 16-20 and regime neutral, take max 2 trades, 0.125 % risk each, only at VWAP ±0.3 % with 5-min confirmation.
Log every agent decision in the reasoning file—no blank logs allowed; if nothing qualifies, write ‘NO EDGE’ and move on.
Hard cap at 3 trades total for the day; after two losses, platform is shut down—no exceptions.

dailyLessons.gradingReason: Zero trades executed, so no new damage, but also no opportunity capture; capital preservation is good, however the account is still bleeding from yesterday’s sloppy session.
keyLessons: When VIX is <20 and regime is NEUTRAL, the playbook requires at least one test-of-open or VWAP-reversion trade—sitting out completely is not the plan.
Yesterday’s 37.5 % win-rate with 5 losses came from oversized 0.25-risk entries; today’s flat day confirms that if the edge isn’t obvious, the correct move is to HALVE size, not to freeze.

goodPatterns: No revenge trades or size creep after the –$506 day; discipline held.
Swing book left untouched—no impulse adds.
badPatterns: Complete trading paralysis; no signals taken even when ES ranged 14 pts and fulfilled the neutral-regime criteria.
Failure to log agent reasoning means no post-market review loop—this is how edge erosion starts.

tomorrowRules: Pre-market: if VIX 16-20 and regime neutral, take max 2 trades, 0.125 % risk each, only at VWAP ±0.3 % with 5-min confirmation.
Log every agent decision in the reasoning file—no blank logs allowed; if nothing qualifies, write ‘NO EDGE’ and move on.
Hard cap at 3 trades total for the day; after two losses, platform is shut down—no exceptions.
dailyLessons.riskAssessment: Risk of ruin unchanged; flat day prevented further drawdown but did not reduce existing open-ended swing exposure.
dailyLessons.emotionalCheck: No revenge or FOMO today, but avoidance behaviour (fear of another red day) is just as dangerous and must be watched.
